2382310.name: The Last Society
2382310.description:
Background: Twenty years ago, a catastrophic zombie outbreak decimated the human population, leaving the world in ruins. You've survived by staying hidden in an underground bunker, but now your supplies are gone, and it's time to face the world above.



Current Situation: The world outside is a desolate, zombie-infested wasteland. As you emerge from your bunker, your sole objective is survival. Explore the remnants of civilization, scavenge for supplies, and avoid the lurking undead. With no main mission to guide you, you have the freedom to raid different maps and locations—abandoned cities, desolate forests—each filled with their own dangers and opportunities. The world is open for you to explore, but every choice could be your last.
2382310.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
